handoff.planSummary: Create ProjectModal.tsx form component using existing Modal/Input/Select UI components. Update Projects.tsx to orchestrate modal state (create/edit/delete) with DataContext dispatch and toast notifications. Refactor ProjectsTable.tsx action handler to pass project context via callback prop. Replace View action with Archive. Add 'New Project' button above the table. Implement delete confirmation as an inline Modal. All reducer actions (ADD_PROJECT, UPDATE_PROJECT, DELETE_PROJECT) already exist in DataContext.

scope.rationale: Creates a new component (ProjectModal.tsx), modifies 2-3 existing components with significant interface changes (ProjectsTable callback refactoring, Projects.tsx modal orchestration), involves multiple interconnected UI flows (create/edit/delete/archive), and requires comprehensive E2E testing across all CRUD operations.
